name: PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk
summary: PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk engages in the real estate development activities in Indonesia. It operates through Apartement Rental and Real Estate, and Hotel segments. The company sells apartments, office buildings, houses, and shophouses, as well as other buildings, such as land. It is also involved in the construction activities; and the rental of space/apartments. In addition, the company owns and operates hotels; and provides building management services. PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk was founded in 1980 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Istana Kuta Ratu Prestige.
